name: clash_manager_navigate_active_view_to_clash_location_by_element_pair
desc: Navigate the Revit view to show a clash location. Selects both clashing elements and zooms to fit them in a section box.

parameters.name: element1_id
parameters.description: Element ID of the first clashing element

parameters.name: element2_id
parameters.description: Element ID of the second clashing element
